external_signals.key_quote: The prompt explicitly tells the system that its commits should 'never include the phrase Claude Code or any mention that you are an AI' and to omit any 'Co-Authored-By lines or any other attribution.'
external_signals.relevance: 主流科技媒体对 Undercover Mode 的报道，聚焦 AI 身份隐藏

external_signals.key_quote: Actively stripping those signals, specifically from public open-source repositories, puts Claude Code in a different category. Open-source contribution norms depend on knowing who — or what — contributed what.
external_signals.relevance: 最深度的 Undercover Mode 分析，含 DCO 合规讨论、Red Hat/QEMU/Fedora 对比

external_signals.key_quote: This very much sounds like it does what it says on the tin, i.e. stays undercover and pretends to be a human.
external_signals.relevance: 开发者社区的激烈辩论——有人说是保护商业机密，有人说是欺骗开源社区

external_signals.source: EU AI Act - Article 50 标注义务
external_signals.key_quote: The EU AI Act requires businesses to clearly label content that has been significantly generated by AI starting August 2, 2026.
external_signals.relevance: 合规背景：EU 2026年8月起强制标注 AI 生成内容，与 Undercover Mode 直接冲突

external_signals.source: AI Code Share 行业数据
external_signals.key_quote: The industry average is 15-25% of committed lines AI-generated in 2026. Top-quartile teams report 40-60%.
external_signals.relevance: 量化背景：AI 代码占比正在快速增长，归属追踪的需求越来越迫切

external_signals.key_quote: The rules covering the transparency of AI-generated content will become applicable on 2 August 2026.
external_signals.relevance: EU 正在制定 AI 生成内容标注的实践准则，2026年6月定稿

original_concepts.name: 归属悖论（Attribution Paradox）
original_concepts.description: 同一套源码里既有抹掉AI身份的Undercover Mode，又有精确到字符级的AI贡献度追踪系统。隐身和标注不是对立的——Anthropic在为两个未来同时做准备

original_concepts.name: 安全默认值（Secure Default）
original_concepts.description: 没有force-off选项的设计哲学。无法确认安全时默认保护——这个原则在Undercover Mode中被执行到了极致
